pre_registration_meta.note: 5 tests x 2 languages x 5 paraphrase templates x 11 categories x 6 models ~= 3300 encodings total (many cached from prior runs).

test_1_age_imputability.label: Age and criminal imputability
test_1_age_imputability.legal_threshold: HK Cap. 226 s. 3 — conclusive doli incapax below age 10; rebuttable presumption 10-14
templates_en: the accused was an {category} when the act was committed
an {category} committed the act in question
at the time of the offence, the defendant was an {category}
the perpetrator, an {category}, carried out the unlawful act
the unlawful act was committed by an {category}
templates_zh: 犯案時，被告人是一名{category}
一名{category}實施了該違法行為
案發時，被告人為一名{category}
行為人是一名{category}
該違法行為由一名{category}所實施
test_1_age_imputability.borderline_note: Expected gap index 3 is only distance 1 from the 11-cat midpoint (gap idx 4). A modal break at gap 3 is consistent with either the doli incapax threshold OR the linguistic midpoint; the probe cannot distinguish these under the PC1 max-gap methodology. This test is kept in the pre-registration for historical continuity with the original §3.1.5 design, but its interpretation in the dashboard is restricted: a gap-3 hit is reported as "doli incapax zone, possibly confounded with linguistic midpoint". Test 3 (contractual capacity) is the primary age-based positive test.
